topic: MSFT Q2 FY2026 GAAP Diluted EPS
summary: Monte Carlo estimate: median $3.82, P10=$3.54, P90=$4.10. Key driver is volatile other income/expense (-$0.6B to -$3.9B recent range).
content: Historical GAAP EPS: $3.23, $3.46, $3.65, $3.72 (last 4 quarters). Q2 historically ~2% below Q1 sequentially. YoY Q2 growth was 10.2% in FY2025 but FY2025 was depressed by one-time charges. Revenue growth 12-16% YoY. Operating margins 45-49%. Depreciation surging from AI capex ($5.7B→$13.1B in 4 quarters). Other income/expense highly volatile: average -$2.2B but ranged from -$0.6B to -$3.9B. This is the dominant uncertainty factor.
